006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
009
010import com.ctre.phoenix6.CANBus;
011import com.ctre.phoenix6.configs.*;
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.*;
013import com.ctre.phoenix6.signals.*;
014import com.ctre.phoenix6.swerve.*;
015import com.ctre.phoenix6.swerve.SwerveModuleConstants.*;
016import edu.wpi.first.math.Matrix;
017import edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N1;
018import edu.wpi.first.math.numbers.N3;
019import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.*;
020
021// Generated by the 2026 Tuner X Swerve Project Generator
022// https://v6.docs.ctr-electronics.com/en/stable/docs/tuner/tuner-swerve/index.html
023public class TunerConstants {
024
025        // Both sets of gains need to be tuned to your individual robot.
026        // The steer motor uses any SwerveModule.SteerRequestType control request with
027        // the
028        // output type specified by SwerveModuleConstants.SteerMotorClosedLoopOutput
029        private static final Slot0Configs steerGains = new Slot0Configs()
030                        .withKP(100)
031                        .withKI(0)
032                        .withKD(0.5)
033                        .withKS(0.1)
034                        .withKV(1.50)
035                        .withKA(0)
036                        .withStaticFeedforwardSign(StaticFeedforwardSignValue.UseClosedLoopSign);
037
038        // When using closed-loop control, the drive motor uses the control
039        // output type specified by SwerveModuleConstants.DriveMotorClosedLoopOutput
040        private static final Slot0Configs driveGains = new Slot0Configs()
041                        .withKP(0.090032)
042                        .withKI(0)
043                        .withKD(0)
044                        .withKS(0.26687)
045                        .withKV(0.12019)
046                        .withKA(0.0084888);
047
048        // The closed-loop output type to use for the steer motors;
049        // This affects the PID/FF gains for the steer motors
050        private static final ClosedLoopOutputType kSteerClosedLoopOutput = ClosedLoopOutputType.Voltage;
051
052        // The closed-loop output type to use for the drive motors;
053        // This affects the PID/FF gains for the drive motors
054        private static final ClosedLoopOutputType kDriveClosedLoopOutput = ClosedLoopOutputType.Voltage;
055
056        // The type of motor used for the drive motor
057        private static final DriveMotorArrangement kDriveMotorType = DriveMotorArrangement.TalonFX_Integrated;
058
059        // The type of motor used for the drive motor
060        private static final SteerMotorArrangement kSteerMotorType = SteerMotorArrangement.TalonFX_Integrated;
061
062        // The remote sensor feedback type to use for the steer motors;
063        // When not Pro-licensed, Fused*/Sync* automatically fall back to Remote*
064        private static final SteerFeedbackType kSteerFeedbackType = SteerFeedbackType.FusedCANcoder;
065
066        // The stator current at which the wheels start to slip;
067        // This needs to be tuned to your individual robot
068        // drive stator current limit
069        private static final Current kSlipCurrent = Amps.of(80);
070
071        // Initial configs for the drive and steer motors and the azimuth encoder; these
072        // cannot be null.
073        // Some configs will be overwritten; check the `with*InitialConfigs()` API
074        // documentation.
075        private static final TalonFXConfiguration driveInitialConfigs = new TalonFXConfiguration()
076                        .withCurrentLimits(new CurrentLimitsConfigs());
077
078        private static final TalonFXConfiguration steerInitialConfigs = new TalonFXConfiguration()
079                        .withCurrentLimits(
080                                        new CurrentLimitsConfigs()
081                                                        . // Swerve azimuth does not require much torque output, so we
082                                                          // can set a
083                                                          // relatively low
084                                                          // stator current limit to help avoid brownouts without
085                                                          // impacting performance.
086                                                        withStatorCurrentLimit(Amps.of(60))
087                                                        .withSupplyCurrentLimit(Amps.of(20))
088                                                        .withStatorCurrentLimitEnable(true));
089
090        private static final CANcoderConfiguration encoderInitialConfigs = new CANcoderConfiguration();
091
092        // Configs for the Pigeon 2; leave this null to skip applying Pigeon 2 configs
093        private static final Pigeon2Configuration pigeonConfigs = null;
094
095        // CAN bus that the devices are located on;
096        // All swerve devices must share the same CAN bus
097        public static final CANBus kCANBus = new CANBus("swerve", "./logs/example.hoot");
098
099        // Theoretical free speed (m/s) at 12 V applied output;
100        // This needs to be tuned to your individual robot
101        public static final LinearVelocity kSpeedAt12Volts = MetersPerSecond.of(4.76);
102
103        // Every 1 rotation of the azimuth results in kCoupleRatio drive motor turns;
104        // This may need to be tuned to your individual robot
105        private static final double kCoupleRatio = 5.4;
106
107        private static final double kDriveGearRatio = 6.48;
108
109        private static final double kSteerGearRatio = 12.1;
110
111        private static final Distance kWheelRadius = Inches.of(2);
112
113        private static final boolean kInvertLeftSide = false;
114
115        private static final boolean kInvertRightSide = true;
116
117        private static final int kPigeonId = 30;
118
119        // These are only used for simulation
120        private static final MomentOfInertia kSteerInertia = KilogramSquareMeters.of(0.01);
121
122        private static final MomentOfInertia kDriveInertia = KilogramSquareMeters.of(0.01);
123
124        // Simulated voltage necessary to overcome friction
125        private static final Voltage kSteerFrictionVoltage = Volts.of(0.2);
126
127        private static final Voltage kDriveFrictionVoltage = Volts.of(0.2);
128
129        public static final SwerveDrivetrainConstants DrivetrainConstants = new SwerveDrivetrainConstants()
130                        .withCANBusName(kCANBus.getName())
131                        .withPigeon2Id(kPigeonId)
132                        .withPigeon2Configs(pigeonConfigs);
133
134        private static final SwerveModuleConstantsFactory<TalonFXConfiguration, TalonFXConfiguration, CANcoderConfiguration> ConstantCreator = new SwerveModuleConstantsFactory<TalonFXConfiguration, TalonFXConfiguration, CANcoderConfiguration>()
135                        .withDriveMotorGearRatio(kDriveGearRatio)
136                        .withSteerMotorGearRatio(kSteerGearRatio)
137                        .withCouplingGearRatio(kCoupleRatio)
138                        .withWheelRadius(kWheelRadius)
139                        .withSteerMotorGains(steerGains)
140                        .withDriveMotorGains(driveGains)
141                        .withSteerMotorClosedLoopOutput(kSteerClosedLoopOutput)
142                        .withDriveMotorClosedLoopOutput(kDriveClosedLoopOutput)
143                        .withSlipCurrent(kSlipCurrent)
144                        .withSpeedAt12Volts(kSpeedAt12Volts)
145                        .withDriveMotorType(kDriveMotorType)
146                        .withSteerMotorType(kSteerMotorType)
147                        .withFeedbackSource(kSteerFeedbackType)
148                        .withDriveMotorInitialConfigs(driveInitialConfigs)
149                        .withSteerMotorInitialConfigs(steerInitialConfigs)
150                        .withEncoderInitialConfigs(encoderInitialConfigs)
151                        .withSteerInertia(kSteerInertia)
152                        .withDriveInertia(kDriveInertia)
153                        .withSteerFrictionVoltage(kSteerFrictionVoltage)
154                        .withDriveFrictionVoltage(kDriveFrictionVoltage);
155
156        // Front Left
157        private static final int kFrontLeftDriveMotorId = 60;
158
159        private static final int kFrontLeftSteerMotorId = 1;
160
161        private static final int kFrontLeftEncoderId = 11;
162
163        private static final Angle kFrontLeftEncoderOffset = Rotations.of(-0.10009765625);
164
165        private static final boolean kFrontLeftSteerMotorInverted = true;
166
167        private static final boolean kFrontLeftEncoderInverted = false;
168
169        private static final Distance kFrontLeftXPos = Inches.of(8.9815);
170
171        private static final Distance kFrontLeftYPos = Inches.of(9.2845);
172
173        // Front Right
174        private static final int kFrontRightDriveMotorId = 13;
175
176        private static final int kFrontRightSteerMotorId = 12;
177
178        private static final int kFrontRightEncoderId = 2;
179
180        private static final Angle kFrontRightEncoderOffset = Rotations.of(-0.24755859375);
181
182        private static final boolean kFrontRightSteerMotorInverted = true;
183
184        private static final boolean kFrontRightEncoderInverted = false;
185
186        private static final Distance kFrontRightXPos = Inches.of(8.9815);
187
188        private static final Distance kFrontRightYPos = Inches.of(-9.2845);
189
190        // Back Left
191        private static final int kBackLeftDriveMotorId = 4;
192
193        private static final int kBackLeftSteerMotorId = 15;
194
195        private static final int kBackLeftEncoderId = 16;
196
197        private static final Angle kBackLeftEncoderOffset = Rotations.of(-0.390869140625);
198
199        private static final boolean kBackLeftSteerMotorInverted = true;
200
201        private static final boolean kBackLeftEncoderInverted = false;
202
203        private static final Distance kBackLeftXPos = Inches.of(-8.9815);
204
205        private static final Distance kBackLeftYPos = Inches.of(9.2845);
206
207        // Back Right
208        private static final int kBackRightDriveMotorId = 31;
209
210        private static final int kBackRightSteerMotorId = 3;
211
212        private static final int kBackRightEncoderId = 14;
213
214        private static final Angle kBackRightEncoderOffset = Rotations.of(-0.081298828125);
215
216        private static final boolean kBackRightSteerMotorInverted = true;
217
218        private static final boolean kBackRightEncoderInverted = false;
219
220        private static final Distance kBackRightXPos = Inches.of(-8.9815);
221
222        private static final Distance kBackRightYPos = Inches.of(-9.2845);
223
224        public static final SwerveModuleConstants<TalonFXConfiguration, TalonFXConfiguration, CANcoderConfiguration> FrontLeft = ConstantCreator
225                        .createModuleConstants(
226                                        kFrontLeftSteerMotorId,
227                                        kFrontLeftDriveMotorId,
228                                        kFrontLeftEncoderId,
229                                        kFrontLeftEncoderOffset,
230                                        kFrontLeftXPos,
231                                        kFrontLeftYPos,
232                                        kInvertLeftSide,
233                                        kFrontLeftSteerMotorInverted,
234                                        kFrontLeftEncoderInverted);
235
236        public static final SwerveModuleConstants<TalonFXConfiguration, TalonFXConfiguration, CANcoderConfiguration> FrontRight = ConstantCreator
237                        .createModuleConstants(
238                                        kFrontRightSteerMotorId,
239                                        kFrontRightDriveMotorId,
240                                        kFrontRightEncoderId,
241                                        kFrontRightEncoderOffset,
242                                        kFrontRightXPos,
243                                        kFrontRightYPos,
244                                        kInvertRightSide,
245                                        kFrontRightSteerMotorInverted,
246                                        kFrontRightEncoderInverted);
247
248        public static final SwerveModuleConstants<TalonFXConfiguration, TalonFXConfiguration, CANcoderConfiguration> BackLeft = ConstantCreator
249                        .createModuleConstants(
250                                        kBackLeftSteerMotorId,
251                                        kBackLeftDriveMotorId,
252                                        kBackLeftEncoderId,
253                                        kBackLeftEncoderOffset,
254                                        kBackLeftXPos,
255                                        kBackLeftYPos,
256                                        kInvertLeftSide,
257                                        kBackLeftSteerMotorInverted,
258                                        kBackLeftEncoderInverted);
259
260        public static final SwerveModuleConstants<TalonFXConfiguration, TalonFXConfiguration, CANcoderConfiguration> BackRight = ConstantCreator
261                        .createModuleConstants(
262                                        kBackRightSteerMotorId,
263                                        kBackRightDriveMotorId,
264                                        kBackRightEncoderId,
265                                        kBackRightEncoderOffset,
266                                        kBackRightXPos,
267                                        kBackRightYPos,
268                                        kInvertRightSide,
269                                        kBackRightSteerMotorInverted,
270                                        kBackRightEncoderInverted);
271
272        /**
273         * Creates a CommandSwerveDrivetrain instance. This should only be called once
274         * in your robot
275         * program,.
276         */
277        public static CommandSwerveDrivetrain createDrivetrain() {
278                return new CommandSwerveDrivetrain(
279                                DrivetrainConstants, FrontLeft, FrontRight, BackLeft, BackRight);
280        }
281
282        /**
283         * Swerve Drive class utilizing CTR Electronics' Phoenix 6 API with the selected
284         * device types.
285         */
286        public static class TunerSwerveDrivetrain extends SwerveDrivetrain<TalonFX, TalonFX, CANcoder> {
287
288                /**
289                 * Constructs a CTRE SwerveDrivetrain using the specified constants.
290                 *
291                 * <p>
292                 * This constructs the underlying hardware devices, so users should not
293                 * construct the devices
294                 * themselves. If they need the devices, they can access them through getters in
295                 * the classes.
296                 *
297                 * @param drivetrainConstants Drivetrain-wide constants for the swerve drive
298                 * @param modules             Constants for each specific module
299                 */
300                public TunerSwerveDrivetrain(
301                                SwerveDrivetrainConstants drivetrainConstants,
302                                SwerveModuleConstants<?, ?, ?>... modules) {
303                        super(TalonFX::new, TalonFX::new, CANcoder::new, drivetrainConstants, modules);
304                }
305
306                /**
307                 * Constructs a CTRE SwerveDrivetrain using the specified constants.
308                 *
309                 * <p>
310                 * This constructs the underlying hardware devices, so users should not
311                 * construct the devices
312                 * themselves. If they need the devices, they can access them through getters in
313                 * the classes.
314                 *
315                 * @param drivetrainConstants     Drivetrain-wide constants for the swerve drive
316                 * @param odometryUpdateFrequency The frequency to run the odometry loop. If
317                 *                                unspecified or set
318                 *                                to 0 Hz, this is 250 Hz on CAN FD, and 100 Hz
319                 *                                on CAN 2.0.
320                 * @param modules                 Constants for each specific module
321                 */
322                public TunerSwerveDrivetrain(
323                                SwerveDrivetrainConstants drivetrainConstants,
324                                double odometryUpdateFrequency,
325                                SwerveModuleConstants<?, ?, ?>... modules) {
326                        super(
327                                        TalonFX::new,
328                                        TalonFX::new,
329                                        CANcoder::new,
330                                        drivetrainConstants,
331                                        odometryUpdateFrequency,
332                                        modules);
333                }
334
335                /**
336                 * Constructs a CTRE SwerveDrivetrain using the specified constants.
337                 *
338                 * <p>
339                 * This constructs the underlying hardware devices, so users should not
340                 * construct the devices
341                 * themselves. If they need the devices, they can access them through getters in
342                 * the classes.
343                 *
344                 * @param drivetrainConstants       Drivetrain-wide constants for the swerve
345                 *                                  drive
346                 * @param odometryUpdateFrequency   The frequency to run the odometry loop. If
347                 *                                  unspecified or set
348                 *                                  to 0 Hz, this is 250 Hz on CAN FD, and 100
349                 *                                  Hz on CAN 2.0.
350                 * @param odometryStandardDeviation The standard deviation for odometry
351                 *                                  calculation in the form
352                 *                                  [x, y, theta]áµ€, with units in meters and
353                 *                                  radians
354                 * @param visionStandardDeviation   The standard deviation for vision
355                 *                                  calculation in the form [x,
356                 *                                  y, theta]áµ€, with units in meters and
357                 *                                  radians
358                 * @param modules                   Constants for each specific module
359                 */
360                public TunerSwerveDrivetrain(
361                                SwerveDrivetrainConstants drivetrainConstants,
362                                double odometryUpdateFrequency,
363                                Matrix<N3, N1> odometryStandardDeviation,
364                                Matrix<N3, N1> visionStandardDeviation,
365                                SwerveModuleConstants<?, ?, ?>... modules) {
366                        super(
367                                        TalonFX::new,
368                                        TalonFX::new,
369                                        CANcoder::new,
370                                        drivetrainConstants,
371                                        odometryUpdateFrequency,
372                                        odometryStandardDeviation,
373                                        visionStandardDeviation,
374                                        modules);
375                }
376        }
377}
